_comment: The firm's actual learning content, across provider partnerships. 'coverage' is the crux: full = real courses incl. a verifiable path; refresh = currency/top-up only, not from-scratch; none = the firm has NO real content (only fragments) — a provision gap to surface. hours = realistic effort. verifiable = produces sellable evidence (cert/showcase). Provider names are placeholders for a public repo.

content.note: Refresh-level only — restores currency, does not build from scratch. Right for someone with stale prior experience.

content.evidence_path: Internal capstone / showcase — converts self-taught into evidenced + Workday-credited.

content.workaround: No real firm course exists. Options: vendor enablement (nCino University) or shadow a certified colleague on a live nCino engagement.
content.note: PROVISION GAP: the firm wants nCino-experienced BAs but has no internal training for it.
